name: setMyShortDescription
description: Use this method to change the bot's short description, which is shown on the bot's profile page and is sent together with the link when users share the bot

parameters.name: short_description
parameters.description: New short description for the bot; 0-120 characters. Pass an empty string to remove the dedicated short description for the given language.

parameters.name: language_code
parameters.description: A two-letter ISO 639-1 language code. If empty, the short description will be applied to all users for whose language there is no dedicated short description.
